mediaservermsgai.name: 媒体库服务器通知AI版
mediaservermsgai.description: 基于Emby识别结果+TMDB元数据+微信清爽版(全消息类型+剧集聚合)
mediaservermsgai.author: jxxghp

history.v1.8.0: 偷魔牛🚀 新增TMDB信息缓存，减少重复API调用；📂 新增CategoryHelper智能分类（可配置开关）；🧹 新增过期缓存自动清理机制；⏸️ 新增暂停/继续播放消息类型选项；🔧 增强stop_service清理逻辑；📝 优化代码结构与注释。
history.v1.7.6: 偷魔牛的新增TV剧集入库聚合功能(防刷屏)；⚡️ 恢复全消息类型支持(登录/评分/测试/播放控制)；🎨 优化通知图标为高清官方源；🔄 融合魔牛插件逻辑同时保留个人排班风格。
history.v1.7.5: 优化微信排版，去除无关**符号
history.v1.7.4.1: ⚡️ 新增SeriesId反查功能，解决路径或单集入库缺失TMDB ID问题；🖼️ 修复音频封面获取报错；🎨 优化通知布局。
history.v1.7.4: 🐛 修复音频封面获取报错(AttributeError)；🎨 优化通知标题格式(点击直达TMDB+自动补全服务器后缀)；🎵 完善音频入库模版与分类提取逻辑。
history.v1.7.3: ✨ 优化元数据排版，评分/地区/状态分行显示；✨ 新增TMDB地区汉化支持；📂 增加路径二级分类精准提取；🎵 优化音频通知专属模版；🖼️ 增强图片回退逻辑（无背景图自动降级海报）。
history.v1.7.2: 修正TMDB入库年份显示，修改音乐入库对齐。DIY很简单建议自己AI下
history.v1.7.1: 新增媒体状态，展示演员前五名
history.v1.7: 兼容神医合并跟pro音乐封面信息通知
history.v1.6: 查询剧集图片兼容没有季集信息的情况
history.v1.5: 支持独立控制媒体服务器通知
history.v1.4: MoviePilot V2 版本媒体库服务器通知插件

Cd2Assistant.name: CloudDrive2助手
Cd2Assistant.description: 监控上传任务，检测是否有异常，发送通知。
Cd2Assistant.author: thsrite

history.v2.0.6: 兼容新版 clouddrive2_client：修复运行信息读取、fs 属性缺失、CloudDrive2 地址尾斜杠导致 gRPC 解析失败等问题。
history.v2.0.3: 优化执行周期输入，需要MoviePilot v2.2.1+
history.v2.0.2: HomePage API支持参数name指定配置(默认取第一个)
history.v1.8.3: 添加异常处理，解决cd2上本地目录获取存储空间失败的问题
history.v1.8.2: 插件页面密码类型设置为pasword
history.v1.8.1: 云下载支持自定义路径 /cd /cd2路径 磁链
history.v1.8: 修复插件依赖安装问题
history.v1.7: 增加HomePage自定义API（详见插件说明）
history.v1.5: 增加云盘同步黑名单（排序挂载本地目录）
history.v1.4: 增加云盘存储空间展示
history.v1.1: 交互命令重启cd2、获取cd2系统信息，支持仪表盘
history.v1.0: 监控上传任务，检测是否有异常，发送通知

tvhhelper.name: TVH Helper
tvhhelper.description: Control TVHeadend from MoviePilot bot: status, DVB adapters, user M3U and EPG URLs.
tvhhelper.author: qqcomeup

history.v0.1.20: Show online stream details on the TVH close-user menu.
history.v0.1.19: Show ISP information separately for TVH client and source IPs.
history.v0.1.18: Add a close button to the top-level TVH bot menu.
history.v0.1.17: Show channel names on TVH close buttons so duplicate users are distinguishable.
history.v0.1.16: Edit or delete the original TVH bot menu on callbacks and show geo-only IP locations.
history.v0.1.15: Render each online TVH user in a separate monospace block.
history.v0.1.14: Add back/close buttons to TVH submenus, improve IP location fallback, and fix bitrate conversion.
history.v0.1.13: Show online TVH details in monospace text, convert rates to Mb/s, and include source IP locations.
history.v0.1.12: Format online TVH user details as quoted bot text and label client/source IPs clearly.
history.v0.1.11: Show the username when closing a TVH connection and add public IP location display in status.
history.v0.1.10: Compact the TVH status message into the selected short layout for bot display.
history.v0.1.9: Normalize TVHeadend base URLs and keep status usable when optional status APIs return forbidden.
history.v0.1.8: Improve online stream status formatting and parse TVHeadend subscription fields such as host, title, service, profile, state, and bitrate.
history.v0.1.7: Remove default detail links from bot replies, add stream IP/client details, and add close-all support.
history.v0.1.6: Move stream closing into a separate menu, show user buttons two per row, and use TVHeadend connections cancel API.
history.v0.1.5: Send user M3U/XML as copyable code blocks, remove the passwd path setting, and simplify plugin metadata for faster UI loading.
history.v0.1.4: Remove the separate DVB menu button, show online streaming users in status, and add close connection buttons.
history.v0.1.3: Keep /tvh as the only bot command and make link buttons reply with copyable short or original TVH URLs.
history.v0.1.2: Add /tvh one-level menu and plugin callback flow for selecting a user before showing M3U/XML links.
history.v0.1.1: Use TVHeadend status inputs for DVB checks and add bot buttons for user M3U/EPG URLs.
history.v0.1.0: Add TVH status, DVB adapter, user short URL query, and DVB change notifications.
